alkylation reagent: alkylated with 17 mM iodoacetamide for 20 min at room temperature
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 17 mM iodoacetamide for 20 min at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested overnight with 1 μg of sequencing grade modified trypsin
instrument: sent to a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: set to 1.3–1.8 kV for the nanospray
reduction reagent: reduced in 9 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 37 °C
reduction concentration: reduced in 9 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 37 °C
